name: Scam Detector
description: Hacker-terminal crypto token scam/rug scanner. Factual on-chain check (GoPlus/RugCheck) grounds a multi-agent colony that debates and returns one verdict — anti-hallucination by design.

operations.name: scan_token
operations.description: Scan ONE crypto token for scam/rug risk: factual check_token grounding, then the scam-detector agent group debates and returns a verdict.

chain.description: eth, bsc, polygon, base, arbitrum, optimism, avalanche, fantom, or solana

address.description: token contract address (EVM 0x... or Solana mint address)
